cherryPick.ready: All conflicts resolved - ready to continue cherry-pick

merge.ready: All conflicts resolved - ready to commit merge

rebase.ready: All conflicts resolved - ready to continue rebase

revert.ready: All conflicts resolved - ready to continue revert

confirmRevert.message_one: All uncommitted changes to {{file}} will be permanently lost.
confirmRevert.message_other: All uncommitted changes to these {{count}} files will be permanently lost.
confirmRevert.title: Revert changes?

divergentPull.intro: This branch and its upstream both have commits the other side does not have. Git cannot choose between rebasing and merging automatically.
divergentPull.mergeBody: Preserves local commit IDs but adds a merge commit.
divergentPull.note: Fast-forward only is not possible when both sides have unique commits.
divergentPull.rebaseBody: Keeps history linear but rewrites local commit IDs.
divergentPull.title: Choose Pull Strategy

allowedSignersErrors.GITMUN_ERROR_SSH_ALLOWED_SIGNERS_HOME_UN: Could not determine the home directory for the allowed signers file.
allowedSignersErrors.GITMUN_ERROR_SSH_ALLOWED_SIGNERS_MISSING: Configure user.email before adding an allowed signer.
allowedSignersErrors.GITMUN_ERROR_SSH_ALLOWED_SIGNERS_NO_TARG: No allowed signers file is available.
allowedSignersErrors.GITMUN_ERROR_SSH_ALLOWED_SIGNERS_SIGNING: Could not resolve user.signingkey to an SSH public key.

log.graphLaneHint: Lane colours show topology, not permanent branches.
log.historyAllRefs: Showing one combined timeline from all local branches, remote branches, tags, and the current checkout. Branch-only commits may appear further down the list.
log.historyDetached: This checkout is detached. Current checkout history only follows the pinned HEAD commit.
log.historyDetachedShallow: This checkout is detached and shallow, so current checkout history may stop at the pinned commit.
log.historyShallow: This checkout is shallow, so current checkout history may be incomplete.
log.noCommitsAllRefs: No commits were returned for any refs.
log.signedBad: This commit has a bad signature.
log.signedUnknownKey: This commit is signed, but the key is not in your keyring.
log.signedUnverified: This commit is signed but could not be verified locally.
log.signedVerified: This commit was signed with a verified signature.
log.sshAllowedSignersMissing: Your SSH allowed signers file is configured but missing. Add your configured signing key to recreate it.
log.sshAllowedSignersUntrusted: This SSH signature could not be matched against your allowed signers file.
log.upstreamOutside: Upstream tip {{ref}} is outside this local history view.

operation.commitAndPushMessage: Gitmun is creating the commit and pushing it to the remote.
operation.commitMessage: Gitmun is writing the commit. This can take a moment for large indexes.
operation.stageAllMessage: Gitmun is staging every working tree change.
operation.stillRunningMessage: This operation is still running. Gitmun will update the view when it finishes.
operation.unstageAllMessage: Gitmun is removing every staged change from the index.

staging.noStagedChanges: No staged changes - stage files to commit
